focus: Menu scene visual fidelity vs reference low-poly coastal image

flat_shading.notes: flatShading:true everywhere — this was the #1 missing piece from all prior cycles. Correctly implemented.

tower_silhouette.notes: CylinderGeometry 7-seg is spot-on. 4 sections + cone roof + battlements. Sandy grey correct.

cliff_rocks.notes: Vertex displacement gives correct angular faces. 3-tone materials add depth. Could push vertex count slightly for finer facets.

ocean_waves.notes: 30x20 segment plane + per-frame displacement + flatShading = animated polygon waves. Missing horizon teal shift.

polygon_clouds.notes: Flat BoxGeometry planes correctly evoke reference clouds. Needs more rotation variety and overlap for layered storm feel.

vegetation.notes: ConeGeometry(4-seg) diamond bushes match reference exactly. Placement on right cliff correct.

camera_framing.notes: (-8,18,28) high angle with tower right-of-center matches reference composition.

lighting.notes: Single directional (storm light) + very dim ambient correct. No distracting point lights on cliff.

what_was_wrong_before: ShaderMaterial on ocean: smooth gradient — not low-poly at all
ShaderMaterial on sky: animated smooth gradient — not polygon clouds
Tower was a BoxGeometry box, not a faceted cylinder
Tower color #14120f (near-black silhouette) not sandy grey #8a8068
No vertex displacement on cliff — perfectly smooth box faces
Camera at (0,12,35) — frontal view, not the high side angle of reference
No polygon cloud shapes — smooth sphere shader
what_is_now_correct: flatShading:true on EVERY material — the single most important architectural fix
PlaneGeometry ocean with per-frame vertex displacement (animated polygon waves)
18 ConeGeometry(4-seg) diamond bushes on right cliff
8 flat BoxGeometry cloud planes in dark grey tones
Camera correctly positioned at high angle
Sandy path ribbon up cliff right side
three_js_recommendations_cycle26: Ocean horizon: add a second flat plane at z=-40 with slightly lighter teal (0x3a8070) as a horizon band
Clouds: add slight random Y rotation (±0.3) and more depth variation (z: -45 to -80) for more layered storm effect
Cliff rocks: increase BoxGeometry segments to 4x4x4 and raise displacement amount to 1.5-2.0 for coarser facets
Ocean color: add a second MeshStandardMaterial (0x3a8070) on the far half of the plane for horizon shift — or split into two planes
Tower battlements: add slight flatShading variation per notch (alternate between #9a9078 and #8a8068) for more polygon interest
Foam: add slow opacity oscillation (sin wave) to foam patch materials in update loop for wave crash effect
gameplay_notes: Menu scene does not affect gameplay. No regressions in card system, effects engine, or minigames. T070 (HUD faction bars) remains top priority for gameplay cycle.
